name: P31 home alignment registry
ephemeralization: One canonical source per concern; generate or verify downstream artefacts. No parallel lore. A change in a source is intentionally coupled to its sinks: CI and this file tell you which command heals or proves alignment.

sources.role: Operator-locked numbers, mission snippet, ground-truth version/schema pins, mesh URLs
p31.shipbox/1.0.0 — JSON handoff snapshot (package, git head, public constants, file flags); p31:shipbox, verify:shipbox
Human manifest for shipbox snapshot; pairs with verify:shipbox and P31-ROOT-MAP handoff row
Human manifest for p31.facts contract; pairs with verify:facts
Keystone: create/connect, ephemeralization, ethical monetization, scale, organize
BONDING phased when-scale plan; cadence and Phase 0–3 gates
p31.facts/1.0.0 — machine-verified paths/keys; npm run verify:facts (mesh URLs, @p31/mesh, policy-file substring guard)
Final handoff: mission system manifest, prep, assemble, definition of done; links P31-CREATE-CONNECT, fleet-portal, verify bar
Generated index of all live URLs (npm run build:fleet-portal); polish → p31ca public/fleet-portal.html
Colors, type scale, motion, focus — hub/org; mobileMeshFirst (touch, safe areas) in generated p31-style.css
p31.ground-truth/1.0.0 — redirects, registry invariants, Three pins
Cognitive Passport authoring (canonical); p31ca mirror is generated
BONDING Soup browser entry; bonding deploy copy via sync
Poets room — lobby for writing, doc library, mesh dialogue, geodesic, narrative links; hub card pending p31ca registry
Normative: p31ca registry ids = hub-app-ids HUB_ALL_CARD_ORDER; one card, one about, one appUrl
p31ca product list (copy, appUrl, related[])
Home / prototype id order; id set must match registry
Sites + mesh/payment snapshot; `sources[]` and mesh URLs must match `p31-constants.json` and worker-allowlist names
@p31/mesh — mesh fleet probe (personal+cage+hubs), agent client, `src/browser.mjs` (no fs); `scripts/verify-mesh-live.mjs`, `p31-mesh` / `p31 mesh` CLI
p31.workerAllowlist/1.0.0 — named Workers + paths; inventory compares to all `wrangler.toml` under andromeda/04_SOFTWARE
Normative: OSS smart home / wearables / operator bridge; pairs with p31-constants integrations
Allowlist of markdown roots for docs/doc-library search index (p31.docIndexManifest/1.0.0)
Progressive physics labs static shell; paired with physics-learn-engine
Gated units, canvas labs, localStorage p31.physicsLearn.v1; headless e2e test:physics-learn:e2e
Education program: progressive stack, security mapping, phases; E0 shell at p31ca /education/ + ground-truth routes.p31LabsEducation
Product index policy: COCKPIT/registry is authoritative for hub grid; legacy mvpData dual-track until ECO merge; pairs with diff-index-sources
p31.oqeTwenty/1.0.0 — forensic 20-face contradiction slots; oqe-icosa.html; not Fate 20
p31.missionTrio/1.0.0 — Build / Create / Connect: ephemeralization (create) + ethical monetization (connect) in hub copy and EBC; single source for sync’d footers

derivations.apply: edit p31-facts.json when adding externally cited file/path/key claims
derivations.note: Declarative invariants: required paths, mesh + org keys, https worker URLs, no credential-like substrings in policy files

to: (stdout JSON or --check; no written artifact required)
derivations.apply: edit p31-constants for public org/mesh/bonding; re-run p31:shipbox for evidence JSON
derivations.note: Sister to p31-facts: human/audit snapshot, not a second contract file

derivations.apply: npm run build:fleet-portal; npm run polish (rewrites CSS href for hub copy)
derivations.verify: verify:facts pathsMustExist fleet-portal.html + build script; optional manual open
derivations.note: One-page directory of every tracked production URL; p31ca short https://p31ca.org/fleet-portal and /fleet-portal.html after deploy

derivations.apply: npm run apply:constants (regenerates fragments / mirrors as implemented in apply-constants.mjs)
derivations.note: canonicalNumbering and schema version must match p31-constants
Passport and p31ca public CSS must be identical after apply

derivations.verify: implicit in bonding build; run hub build after sync when shipping

derivations.note: Joint constraint: same id set in both from[] files. index.astro grid is data-driven. Spec: docs/P31-HUB-CARD-ECOSYSTEM.md

derivations.apply: When `mesh` or `payment` URLs change in p31-constants, update `p31-live-fleet.json` `meshAndPayments` (and `sources` if needed) so the bundle matches
derivations.note: verify-ecosystem.mjs compares `p31-ecosystem.json` templates, then asserts live-fleet mesh/payment block tracks constants

derivations.apply: New Worker: add `wrangler.toml` under andromeda/04_SOFTWARE, add allowlist entry (`name` = wrangler `name`). If mesh URL: p31-constants + apply:constants, then p31-live-fleet. See p31ca docs/EDGE-SECURITY.md, SECURITY-RUNBOOK.md
derivations.verify: from p31ca: npm run security:workers (also in npm run security:check after hub build in release paths)
derivations.note: verify-worker-inventory.mjs walks wrangler files; unlisted → P1. Excludes */docs/files/*. CORS heuristics in same script

derivations.verify: npm run verify:constants (integrations schema, openCatalog https, src/public/json parity)
derivations.note: Human doc: docs/P31-INTEGRATIONS-BRIDGE.md; route /integrations; ground-truth routes.integrationsBridge

derivations.verify: npm run verify:doc-index (after build:doc-index in root verify; Node uses npm minisearch, browser uses vendor UMD + worker). Browser e2e: npm run test:doc-library:e2e; also run in p31:all unless --skip-e2e
derivations.note: index.json is generated; UI/worker/vendor are hand-maintained. Schema p31.docLibrary/1.0.0. Hub: npm run sync:doc-library:p31ca → p31ca public/doc-library/ (ground-truth docLibraryHub, redirect /doc-library)

derivations.apply: npm run sync:doc-library:p31ca (invokes build:doc-index; requires andromeda tree)
derivations.verify: p31ca npm run verify:ground-truth (fileSnippets docLibrary.hubMirror, edgeRedirect /doc-library)
derivations.note: PLAN-DOCUMENT-LIBRARY.md Phase 3; optional partial clone without p31ca

derivations.apply: Edit hand-maintained static assets (no build step; optional p31-constants.json fetch for Larmor)
derivations.verify: npm run test:physics-learn:e2e; also in p31:all unless --skip-e2e; P31_PHYSICS_LEARN_E2E=1 in validate:full for scorecard
derivations.note: Sister surface to doc-library: local-only progressive physics; P31-ROOT-MAP + AGENTS.md

derivations.apply: New hub cards: registry + hub-app-ids + hub:build; do not add products only to mvpData (see ADR). Optional: diff-index-sources --strict-mvp when cleaning legacy.
derivations.verify: p31ca prebuild: scripts/hub/diff-index-sources.mjs (warnings expected until merge)
derivations.note: Exit: align mvpData to registry or remove dual-track per ADR

derivations.apply: Barrel in quantum-clock; static tomography must declare `const TRIM_HZ_MIN` matching `TRIM_HZ_MIN` in dome-constants
derivations.verify: npm run verify:quantum-clock (invoked from verify-p31ca-contracts when p31ca present)
derivations.note: PLAN: docs/PLAN-QUANTUM-CLOCK.md; landing + dome: Cuckoo + Grandfather (global.css --p31-grandfather-phase, event p31:quantum-clock)

derivations.apply: Hand-curated E0: page schema p31.labsEducation/0.1.0; _redirects + ground-truth edgeRedirects 1:1; hub: `id` education in registry.mjs + hub-app-ids.mjs + education-about.html from generate-about-pages
derivations.verify: from p31ca: npm run verify:ground-truth (fileSnippets p31Labs.educationE0)
derivations.note: optional: partial clone without andromeda — skip; education live URLs https://p31ca.org/education/ short /learn /edu

derivations.apply: OQE copy only in p31-oqe-twenty.json; oqe-icosa.html fetches; Dome vertex `oqe-icosa` + /oqe short URL in ground-truth + _redirects
derivations.verify: from p31ca: npm run verify:oqe-icosa (includes dome-cockpit OQE node check)
derivations.note: Forensic p31.oqeTwenty vs assistive p31.fateTwenty — never merge public JSON

derivations.apply: from p31ca: node scripts/sync-connect-mission-ebc.mjs (prebuild, after registry/trio edits)
derivations.note: Create = GEODESIC / ephemeralized rigging; Connect = K₄ mesh + same economics the repo proves (see creator-economy transparency.missionLink)

verifyPipeline.description: Root `package.json` `verify` = prelude + scripts in order. Update this file whenever `verify` changes.
verifyPipeline.preludeNote: Fast guard (verify-alignment.mjs): JSON + required sources. Skipped in the `--verify` loop (prelude already satisfied).
